meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy for Freelancers: Overcome No Marketing
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing to bypass marketing hurdles. Use this guide with Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-converting pricing tiers for your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop guessing your value. By implementing data-driven, tiered SaaS pricing models using AI-assisted analysis, you convert prospects into buyers without traditional marketing. Use Antigravity to simulate customer personas and Claude Code to deploy dynamic pricing logic directly into your codebase, ensuring your pricing reflects real market demand and profit margins.
content.intro:
You’ve built the perfect feature set, but the silence from your client's dashboard is deafening. The 'no marketing' trap isn't a failure of product; it’s a failure of packaging. When your pricing doesn't communicate value, your code is just a expensive line item rather than a growth engine.

We are going to flip the script. By treating pricing as a technical engineering challenge rather than a marketing chore, you can build self-optimizing tiers that do the heavy lifting for you. With Antigravity’s simulation capabilities and Claude Code’s rapid iteration, you will ship a professional pricing architecture that drives conversion by design.

steps.title: Persona-Based Market Simulation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to model your ideal customer profiles and map their willingness to pay against your core features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided feature list and generate three distinct SaaS pricing tiers (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) based on value-based pricing metrics for a mid-market B2B audience.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze features.json to generate pricing tiers and output to pricing_model.json'

steps.title: Architecting the Pricing Schema
steps.description: Define the data structure for your pricing tiers to ensure they are modular and easy for your client to update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust TypeScript interface for a SaaS pricing model that supports monthly/yearly billing, feature-based gating, and custom plan overrides.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'create src/types/pricing.ts using the generated schema'

steps.title: Implementing Dynamic Pricing Logic
steps.description: Build the backend logic that calculates plan eligibility based on usage metrics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service function in Node.js that evaluates user usage against plan limits defined in the pricing schema and returns the recommended upgrade path.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate pricing_service.ts and unit tests for plan evaluation'

steps.title: Frontend Conversion Optimization
steps.description: Build a high-converting pricing table component that highlights the 'recommended' tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive React PricingTable component that visually emphasizes the Pro tier and includes dynamic toggles for monthly vs annual billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'create components/PricingTable.tsx with Tailwind CSS'

steps.title: A/B Testing Hookup
steps.description: Integrate telemetry to track which pricing tier receives the most clicks, allowing for data-driven adjustments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add basic event tracking to the PricingTable component that sends clicks to a mock analytics endpoint for performance monitoring.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add analytics instrumentation to PricingTable.tsx'

pro_tips: Always anchor your mid-tier price to the average cost of the manual process your SaaS replaces.
Use 'decoy pricing'—introduce an Enterprise tier that is intentionally expensive to make the Pro tier look like a bargain.
Never hardcode prices; always inject them from an environment variable or a CMS to allow client updates without code redeploys.
Implement 'feature gating' at the API level, not just the UI, to prevent users from bypassing restrictions.
Run your pricing copy through a readability analyzer; simplicity in pricing text increases conversion by up to 20%.
content.next_steps: Deploy your pricing model to a staging environment, run a simulation via Antigravity, and present the conversion-optimized dashboard to your client for immediate sign-off.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your code go to waste because of poor positioning. By automating your pricing strategy, you provide a service that pays for itself ten times over. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
